questions.question: Does the useMoodTheme hook read/write lp_settings_v1 and provide the active Chakra theme?
questions.actionable_check: Check useMoodTheme.ts reads readSettings().mood on mount, writes on setTheme, returns calmTheme or playfulTheme
questions.pass_criteria: lp_settings_v1 written with correct mood value; activeTheme switches correctly

questions.question: Does _app.tsx use dynamic theme from useMoodTheme hook?
questions.actionable_check: Check pages/_app.tsx uses useMoodTheme().activeTheme in ChakraProvider
questions.pass_criteria: ChakraProvider receives activeTheme from hook, not hardcoded calmTheme

questions.question: Does the Settings page have mood toggle (calm/playful) buttons?
questions.actionable_check: Check pages/settings.tsx renders theme-calm-btn and theme-playful-btn
questions.pass_criteria: Both buttons visible; active theme has visual indicator

questions.question: Does mood selection persist after page reload?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 3: select playful, reload, still shows playful

questions.question: Does the Reset All Data button show a confirmation modal before resetting?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 4: click reset btn, modal appears with cancel and confirm buttons
questions.pass_criteria: reset-modal-content visible with reset-cancel-btn and reset-confirm-btn

questions.question: Does confirming reset clear all lp_* localStorage keys?
questions.actionable_check: E2E test 6: confirm reset, localStorage.getItem('lp_selectedTopics_v1') returns null
questions.pass_criteria: All lp_* keys removed; success banner shown

questions.question: Is the StorageWarning banner present in the global layout?
questions.actionable_check: Check Layout.tsx imports and renders StorageWarning component
questions.pass_criteria: StorageWarning rendered inside main container in Layout

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 6 Story 08 E2E tests pass?
Do all prior story tests still pass (no regressions)?
